content_markdown:
# Solvency II: National Specific Templates LOG files

Supervisory Statement 6/18

Published on 06 July 2018

### Overview

In this Supervisory Statement (SS), the Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) sets out its expectation of firms when completing their submission of National Specific Templates (NSTs).

This SS is relevant to all UK Solvency II firms and to the Society of Lloyd’s and its managing agents.

This SS is effective from Monday 31 December 2018.

[ Supervisory Statement 6/18](/-/media/boe/files/prudential-regulation/supervisory-statement/2024/ss618-november-2024-deleted.pdf)

This SS has been deleted.

---

## Full Document Content (from BoE PDF)

Supervisory Statement | SS6/18  Solvency II: National Specific Templates LOG files  July 2018 Deleted

Supervisory Statement | SS6/18  Solvency II: National Specific Templates LOG files  July 2018  ©   Bank of England   2018  Prudential Regulation Authority   |   20 Moorgate   |   London EC2R 6DA Deleted

Contents  Introduction   3 1  National Specific Template LOG files   3 2  Implementation   3 3  Appendix   4 Deleted

Solvency II: National Specific Templates LOG files July 2018   3  Introduction 1  1.1 In this Supervisory Statement (SS), the Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) sets out its expectation of firms when completing their submission of National Specific Templates (NSTs).  1.2   This SS is relevant to all UK Solvency II firms and to the Society of Lloyd’s and its managing  agents.  National Specific Template LOG files 2  2.1 The PRA expects firms to complete their submission of National Specific Template requirements in line with the information provided in the LOG files.  2.2 Minor corrections and clarifications to the LOG files may be made over time via updates and reporting clarifications respectively on the Regulatory Reporting pages of the Bank of England ’s website. 1  Implementation 3  3.1 This SS comes into effect on Monday 31 December 2018.  1   www.bankofengland.co.uk/prudential-regulation/regulatory-reporting/regulatory-reporting-insurance-sector . Deleted

Solvency II: National Specific Templates LOG files

Supervisory Statement 6/18
Published on 06 July 2018

Overview

In this Supervisory Statement (SS), the Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) sets out its expectation of firms when completing their submission of National Specific Templates (NSTs).

This SS is relevant to all UK Solvency II firms and to the Society of Lloyd’s and its managing agents.

This SS is effective from Monday 31 December 2018.

Supervisory Statement 6/18

This SS has been deleted.
